product_highlights: 400+ premium specialty ingredients for cosmetic formulation
Multi-functional powders achieving soft-focus, mattifying, and SPF-boosting simultaneously
Film former systems for long-wear, barrier, and shine properties
Visionary expertise and formulation support across all personal care categories
notes: Presperse is a leading cosmetic ingredients supplier offering over 400 premium specialty ingredients with a particular strength in texture and sensory modification. Their powder portfolio includes multi-functional offerings that achieve soft-focus, mattifying, and SPF-boosting effects simultaneously, providing formulators with efficient, cost-effective solutions. Presperse's film former systems help formulators achieve long-wear, barrier, and shine properties across skincare, sun care, hair care, and color cosmetics applications.
